3034400.name: Medieval Businessman
3034400.description:
Welcome to the Empty Patch of Land. Can you create your own beautiful kingdom here? In this strategy in real time you can build farms, taverns, barracks, and more.
Bring this patch of land to life. Perhaps you will create your ideal kingdom and achieve profitability!

Game features:
3D graphics: The game is visually appealing and allows you to see your city in three-dimensional space.
5 types of buildings: You have access to different types of buildings, such as offices, factories, and shops. Choose wisely to make your city thrive.
